hpa: Human Protein Atlas is link-out context only; no HPA value enters any score or rank. (The authors' own tissue analysis is external HPA v25.0/GTEx - Methods p.45.)

locators.claim: 4 healthy human donors x 3 stimulation conditions
blood-derived primary NAIVE human CD4+ T cells (PBMC-enriched leukapheresis / Leukopaks)
no tissue/organ axis in GWCD4i; tissue specificity is an EXTERNAL HPA v25.0 / GTEx annotation (Tau index)
screen significance threshold FDR < 10% (paper inference; spot displays none)
mRNA vs. protein readouts explicitly distinguished by the authors
sign convention; CD3/LCP2 -> IL2 and GATA3 -> IL13 identified after re-stimulation
TCR components, Mediator (MED12, MED24), SAGA (TAF6L, TADA1, TADA2B, SUPT20H, USP22)
arrayed validation by bulk RNAseq AND intracellular protein staining / flow cytometry; FDR stars *<5% **<1% ***<0.1%
NFKB2 -> IL10 protein levels did NOT mirror the transcriptional phenotype

methods_text: Marson preprint concordance (read-only). The paper's claim is a per-cytokine log2FC on regulator knockdown (mRNA, CRISPRi Perturb-seq; FDR-based). The released Stage-2 estimand is a target-masked DE-space program projection, delta_p(X) = mean(panel \ mask) - mean(control \ mask), over the SAME released per-gene log2FC. The substrate is shared, so the paper's direction is checked against it exactly; a program delta is NOT a per-cytokine effect, so the two are never equated and no verdict is drawn from the projection. Stage-2 displays no p/q and draws no inference.

rebind_requirement.direct_artifact: the projection here recomputes the RELEASED formula; it is NOT a read of an admitted Direct run, because none is admitted. A REBIND + RECOMPUTE against the final admitted Direct artifact is REQUIRED before any UI inclusion.
rebind_requirement.direct_code_schema_note: the released Direct run_screen.py consumes panel_ensembl / control_ensembl, which the v3 release registry does not expose (it exposes panel_genes_measured + controls_by_bin); Direct has therefore not itself been rebound to v3, and that rebind is part of the admitted-artifact gate.
rebind_requirement.registry: this artifact is now bound to the ADMITTED Stage-1 v3 release registry (raw/canonical/self recorded above) and delta_p was RE-DERIVED against its panel + binned-control sets

result.condition_note: the paper's directional claims are re-stimulation-specific (p.9); no pooled cross-condition ratio is reported
not_comparable: IL2: readout panel member of NO released program
IL10: readout panel member of NO released program (it IS a CONTROL-bin gene of tfh_like, so it enters that program's control mean - still not a readout of IL10)
broad TCR/Mediator/SAGA breadth: the released estimand carries no per-cytokine breadth measure
protein readouts: this analysis is mRNA-only

supersedes.reason: W17 independent review: the registry pin bound a SUPERSEDED Stage-1 registry, and locator L1 conflated three claims. Both repaired; delta_p RE-DERIVED against the admitted registry (24/24 values changed), not relabelled.
